name: unihasher

metadata.name: unihasher
metadata.summary: Compare image hashes using a unified library

documentation:
# Unified Hasher

This library aims to streamline usage of different perceptual image hashes. 



# Installation

**pip**

```pip install unihasher```



# Details

The library provides the following methods for comparing the similarity of two image hashes:

1. Individual Hash - The verdict for whether an image was good or modified from a bad one was determined solely from a single hash algorithm.

2. Majority Decision - The similarity values for all four hashing algorithms were compared separately, and the final verdict was the verdict of the majority of the hash algorithms. In the case of a tie, the verdict of the best performing hash from Approach 1 was taken. 

3. Decision Tree - The similarity values for a combination of all four hashing algorithms were considered by passing the values through a decision tree.



The hashing algorithms implemented are:

dhash, phash, whash from imagehash library

nmfhash adapted from Robust Perceptual Image Hashing Based on Ring Partition and NMF (Tang et al.)



For more details, please refer to our paper.



Made by: [Akshara Mantha](https://github.com/mynameisashllee), [Peng Ruijia](https://github.com/mango-milkshake), [Tan Siying](https://github.com/Cp-Youfy)



# Usage

Please refer to `unihasher_demo/unihasher_usage.py` for details on how you may use the library.

classes.name: unihasher.hash.Hasher

methods.name: unihasher.hash.Hasher.__init__
documentation: imgHashSize: Size used for normalisation of imagehash

methods.name: unihasher.hash.Hasher.dhash
documentation:
Hashes the image using dhash from imagehash library
imgPath: Path to image
hashSize: Size to downsize image to ((n + 1) x n square)

methods.name: unihasher.hash.Hasher.phash
documentation:
Hashes the image using phash from imagehash library
imgPath: Path to image
hashSize: Size to downsize image to (n x n square)

methods.name: unihasher.hash.Hasher.whash
documentation:
Hashes the image using whash from imagehash library
imgPath: Path to image
hashSize: Size to downsize image to (n x n square)

methods.name: unihasher.hash.Hasher.nmfhash
documentation: Hashes the image using NMF Hash Python implementation

methods.name: unihasher.hash.Hasher.hamming
documentation:
Calculates hamming distance between two imagehash hashes (dhash, phash, whash)
h1: ImageHash object (use imagehash.hex_to_hash(hexStr) to convert from stored hex string)
h2: ImageHash object (use imagehash.hex_to_hash(hexStr) to convert from stored hex string)
Returns value in range [0, 1]: the closer to 0, the greater similarity

methods.name: unihasher.hash.Hasher.pearsonCorr
documentation:
Calculates Pearson correlation coefficient for two NMF hashes
h1: Hash string 1
h2: Hash string 2
Returns value in range [-1, 1]: the closer to 1, the greater similarity

Hasher class encapsulates all available hashes
dhash, phash, whash, nmfhash

classes.name: unihasher.unihasher.Unihasher

methods.name: unihasher.unihasher.Unihasher.__init__
documentation:
Initialises parameters for hashes
imgHashSize: Size to downscale phash, dhash and whash to (n x n)
nmfHashSize: Size to downscale nmfhash to (n x n)
nmfHashRings: Number of rings to use for nmfhash

methods.name: unihasher.unihasher.Unihasher.single_hash
documentation:
Hashes image with one hash
hashType: dhash | phash | whash | nmfhash
imgPath: Path to image file
toStr: (for imagehash dhash | phash | whash) Store as hex string

methods.name: unihasher.unihasher.Unihasher.comp_hashes
documentation:
Returns similarity metric for the two hashes given hashType
hashType: dhash | phash | whash | nmfhash
h1: Hash string 1
h2: Hash string 2

methods.name: unihasher.unihasher.Unihasher.single_hash_comp
documentation:
Returns True / False if two hash strings are matching based on hash type given
hashType: dhash | phash | whash | nmfhash
h1: Hash string 1
h2: Hash string 2

methods.name: unihasher.unihasher.Unihasher.majority_hash_comp
documentation:
Returns True if **more than** thresh hashes match. If tie, use dhash result.
h1: Hash string 1
h2: Hash string 2 
verbose: Prints output of hashes that are matching

methods.name: unihasher.unihasher.Unihasher.decision_tree_comp
documentation:
Returns True / False based on the result of the decision tree
(True: Matching image)

Please modify tree accordingly to any needs or new discoveries
imgPath1: Path of first image to match
imgPath2: Path of second image to match
verbose: Prints each node dictionary to trace traversal path

NOTE: Thresholds used in tree are fixed, not using self.hashThreshDict! They are optimised through our decision tree construction. Please refer to our Report for the visualisation.

methods.name: unihasher.unihasher.Unihasher.test_decision_tree_comp
documentation:
Returns True / False based on the result of the decision tree
(True: Matching image)

Use this function if you have similarity metrics to check against the decision tree

Also acts as a helper function for decision_tree_comp
simVals: Dictionary of similarity score e.g. {'dhash': 0, 'phash': 0, 'whash': 0, 'nmfhash': 0}
verbose: Prints each node dictionary to trace traversal path

methods.name: unihasher.unihasher.Unihasher.evaluate
documentation: Function to check the results if using this library for testing

Provides methods to use hashes in this library
=== TO USE ===
Run set_thresholds(dhashThresh, phashThresh, whashThresh, nmfhashThresh) first to set the hash thresholds as desired, or leave parameters blank to use default configurations from our paper.

classes.name: unihasher.NMF_Hash.NMFHash

methods.name: unihasher.NMF_Hash.NMFHash.__init__
documentation:
imgSize: Size of image to downscale to
ring: Number of rings to add to image

methods.name: unihasher.NMF_Hash.NMFHash.nmfFunc
documentation: NMF Matrix Factorisation using Multiplicative Update Method

methods.name: unihasher.NMF_Hash.NMFHash.ringNMF
documentation: Performing ring NMF on image

methods.name: unihasher.NMF_Hash.NMFHash.createHashString
documentation: Generate hash string based on matrix returned from NMF function

methods.name: unihasher.NMF_Hash.NMFHash.singleHashCode
documentation: Performs NMF and creates hash string for one image

methods.name: unihasher.NMF_Hash.NMFHash.compareHashString
documentation:
Compares two hash strings
returns Pearson Correlation Coefficient (value between -1 to 1: the closer to 1, the greater similarity)

Adapted from "Robust Perceptual Image Hashing Based on Ring Partition and NMF"
(https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/6477042)
